courses.name: Project Management
courses.description: Learn to plan, execute, and deliver projects on time using industry-standard Agile and Waterfall methodologies. This course transforms you from a beginner into a confident project manager capable of leading cross-functional teams.
whatYouLearn: Plan and manage projects using Agile & Waterfall methodologies
Use Trello, Jira, and Asana to track project progress
Facilitate Scrum ceremonies: standups, retrospectives, sprint planning
Write professional PRDs and project documentation
Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks effectively

weeks.content: Using Jira for tracking, writing PRDs
weeks.assignment: Create a project plan in Jira

courses.name: Product Management
courses.description: Master the art of building products users love. From ideation to launch, learn customer discovery, competitive analysis, roadmapping, and how to measure product success with data-driven KPIs.
whatYouLearn: Understand the full product lifecycle from idea to growth
Conduct customer discovery interviews and competitor analysis
Build product roadmaps and prioritize features effectively
Define and track KPIs: DAU, MAU, retention, and churn
Use Miro, Notion, and Amplitude for product workflows

weeks.assignment: Calculate KPIs for a sample product

courses.name: Product Design (UI/UX)
courses.description: Design beautiful, user-centered digital products from scratch. Learn design thinking, user research, wireframing, and prototyping using Figma — the industry's most in-demand design tool.
whatYouLearn: Apply Gestalt principles, typography, and color theory in design
Conduct user research and build detailed user personas
Create user flows, wireframes, and information architecture
Build high-fidelity prototypes and interactive mockups in Figma
Run usability tests and iterate based on real user feedback

weeks.assignment: Create user flow for an e-commerce app
Build a wireframe for a mobile app
Figma prototype with user testing notes

courses.name: Data Analytics
courses.description: Turn raw data into powerful insights. Learn to clean, analyze, and visualize data using Excel, SQL, Python, and Power BI — the essential toolkit for any data-driven career.
whatYouLearn: Clean and transform messy datasets using Excel and Python
Write SQL queries to extract insights from relational databases
Analyze data with Pandas DataFrames and NumPy arrays
Build interactive dashboards and reports with Power BI
Present data findings with clear, compelling visualizations

weeks.assignment: Clean a dirty dataset in Excel
Write 5 SQL queries on sample data

courses.name: Software Engineering
courses.description: Become a full-stack developer. Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React for frontend, and Python with Django for backend. You'll build real-world projects, learn Git version control, and deploy applications.
whatYouLearn: Use Git and GitHub for professional version control and collaboration
Build responsive websites with HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox, and Grid
Program with JavaScript: DOM manipulation, functions, and objects
Create dynamic single-page apps with React components and state
Build backend APIs and database-powered apps with Python and Django

weeks.content: Git init, add, commit, push, branches

courses.name: Cybersecurity
courses.description: Protect systems, networks, and data from cyber threats. Learn networking fundamentals, ethical hacking tools, cryptography, and security best practices used by professionals worldwide.
whatYouLearn: Understand the OSI model, TCP/IP, DNS, and HTTP/HTTPS protocols
Identify and analyze malware, phishing, and social engineering attacks
Apply cryptographic techniques: hashing, encryption, and SSL/TLS
Use Wireshark for packet analysis and Nmap for network scanning
Perform basic penetration testing and vulnerability assessments

weeks.assignment: Capture and analyze packets with Wireshark

weeks.content: Nmap for scanning, Wireshark for analysis
